title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Alstom India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Alstom India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
